name: Patient Management System
description: Event-driven microservices platform for healthcare clinic coordination, implementing role-based authentication, calendar conflict resolution, and real-time billing ledgers.
details: Features synchronous gRPC client account registration, duration-based appointment conflict prevention, automated financial ledger credit/debit calculation, and Kafka event logs.

name: FinSight
description: A full-stack financial literacy portal designed to optimize expenditures, simulate long-term compound savings growth, and encourage healthy budgeting routines.
details: Analyzes personal bank statement uploads, visualizes categories of expense leakages, and generates compounding loan and investment forecast projections with interactive graphs.

name: RAGChatbot
description: Enterprise-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot. Ingests structured documents, splits content into vectorized chunks, and queries local vector databases to enrich AI responses.
details: Supports PDF document ingestion, interactive vector spatial chunk matching visualization, custom prompt formatting overrides, and step-by-step reasoning log displays.

name: StockVibe
description: Real-time stock price analytics dashboard integrated with natural language sentiment evaluation of financial news streams.
details: Streams live security ticker prices over WebSockets, maps rolling moving averages, and applies NLP lexical analysis on scraped RSS feed news headers to determine bullish/bearish trends.

name: StudyBuddy
description: Multi-agent cognitive tutoring suite that routes subject inquiries to pedagogical personas specializing in Socratic dialogue, analogy mapping, and exam verification.
details: Features conversational state tracking for tutor continuity, automated mock exam quiz generation, audio translation summarizers, and text-to-speech revision feeds.
